rawContent:
Tweet by @StacksDevs (Stacks Developers)
Author bio: Home of the @Stacks developer community.

Tools, guidance and resources to build on Bitcoin's leading L2.

$20,000 Stacks hackathon: https://t.co/fKVplEOD8u
Text: NEW: Anyone can build on Stacks.

Feed Claude these two commands and you'll have everything you need to write your own Clarity smart contracts 👇

/plugin marketplace add stx-labs/claude-marketplace

/plugin install clarity-plugin@stx-labs
